params.value: SELECT OwnerId, COUNT(Id) qualCount FROM Task WHERE (TaskSubtype = 'Call' OR CallType = 'Inbound' OR CallType = 'Outbound') AND CallDurationInSeconds >= 120 AND ActivityDate = THIS_QUARTER AND OwnerId IN ({{JS_Config.repIdInClause()}}) GROUP BY OwnerId
